title: stupid HOTT
label: self-released
notes: 9-track digital release. Part of the alphabets Bandcamp archive spanning 2008–2013.
body:
9-track alphabets digital release, June 30, 2010. Tracklist confirmed from Bandcamp:

1. so talk all on
2. bitter
3. so walk all out
4. kirby styles
5. easy
6. waldo dissed the hype
7. dank
8. tug hair
9. air conditions
